rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF OOUIDA DAVIS SMITH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Suspension Of Powers And Removal Of Bertha Joung, Administrator Of The Estate Of Oouida Smith Prob. Code 8502 And Prob. Code 8503.
rulings.Rulings: Continued to January 23, 2018. A Petition for Removal of a Personal Representative requires a citation (see Probate Code section 8500). The Register of Actions does not reflect that Petitioner presented a Citation to the Court for issuance and there is no Proof of Service on file for a citation. Also, there is no Proof of Service of the Notice of Hearing on file as of 12/15/17.
